name: Bill's Cheesecake with Sour Cream
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Cream cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the crumbs, nuts, and melted butter. Pack onto the bottom of a greased 10-inch spring form pan. Chill for 30 minutes.
2. Beat together the cheese, 1 cup of sugar, and salt. Add the flour and egg yolks one at a time, beating until very smooth. Beat in the lemon juice, vanilla, almond extract, and sour cream. Mix well.
3. Beat the egg whites until soft peaks form. Gradually beat in the remaining sugar until stiff but not dry; fold into the cheese mixture.
4. Slowly pour the batter into the prepared chilled spring form pan.
5. Bake at 325 degrees F for 1 1/4 hours. Open the oven door and turn off the oven. Let the cake cool for 1 hour in the oven.
6. Remove from the oven and let it finish cooling on a cake rack. Chill for at least an hour before removing the sides of the pan. Serves 10 - 12.
